LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STRAVA, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS PRECLUDED AS A MATTER OF LAW BECAUSE MR. FLINT IMPLIEDLY ASSUMED THE RISKS OF BICYCLING. THE DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT BICYCLING IS AN INHERENT RISKY ACTIVITY. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED.
